message:
fix(daemon): extract atomic counters from DaemonState for sync Drop

Refactor in-flight request tracking to avoid spawning an async task
from Drop (which could be lost during shutdown):

- Extract DaemonCounters struct holding requests_served and in_flight
  as Arc'd atomics, accessible without holding the state mutex.
- InFlightGuard now holds Arc<DaemonCounters> directly, enabling
  synchronous decrement in Drop without spawning.
- InFlightGuard::acquire takes &Arc<Mutex<DaemonState>> (shared ref)
  instead of consuming Arc.

model_registry.rs:
- Add bounds validation to TruncateEmbedder::new rejecting
  target_dim == 0 or > native dimension.
- Add MockMrlEmbedder and tests for oversized, zero, valid, and
  native dimension cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
